overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a character in traditional robes poling a small boat through a historic Middle Eastern harbor. The scene features stone buildings, wooden docks, sailing vessels, and palm trees along the waterfront under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock harbor with moored vessels

agents.ego_description: standing upright on the boat, poling through the harbor water with a long wooden pole, pushing against the riverbed to propel forward

entered.detail: elevated wooden dock structure with support beams extending over the water
tan stone buildings with flat roofs and small windows typical of historic Middle Eastern architecture
small wooden boat floating idle in the harbor
group of palm trees visible against the skyline beyond the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character begins poling the boat away from a wooden dock structure. Stone buildings line the left side of the harbor while palm trees are visible in the distance. The water is calm and greenish, with other small boats moored nearby under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy harbor with large sailing vessels and loading cranes

events.description: passing alongside a large wooden sailing ship with furled sails and tall masts

agents.ego_description: continuing to pole the boat through the harbor, navigating between moored vessels and maintaining a steady course

notable_agents.action: distant figure visible on a small boat in the harbor

entered.detail: large traditional wooden sailing vessel with tall mast and furled sail, moored at the dock
tall wooden crane structure used for loading cargo onto ships, with long wooden arm
large stone warehouse with multiple levels and small windows facing the harbor

segments.scene_description: The boat moves deeper into the harbor, passing a large wooden dhow with tall masts on the left. Wooden cranes used for loading cargo become prominent along the stone warehouses. The harbor is active with various moored vessels and the cityscape extends into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with sandy beach and palm-lined shore

events.description: approaching the sandy shoreline as the harbor opens to a beach area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: poling toward the shore where the water meets a sandy beach lined with dense palm trees

entered.detail: sandy beach area where the water meets the land, with visible shoreline
dense cluster of palm trees lining the coast providing shade along the beach
historic stone building with arched windows situated along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character poles the boat toward a sandy beach area where the harbor meets the shore. Palm trees line the coast and the architecture shifts to coastal buildings. The large harbor cranes and vessels recede into the background as the open beach and shoreline become the dominant features.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling historic harbor that gradually transitions into a serene coastal shoreline. It begins with the character poling a small boat away from a wooden dock, gliding past stone buildings and moored vessels across calm, greenish water under a bright midday sun. As the boat moves deeper into the harbor, the perspective shifts to pass a large wooden dhow with tall masts and prominent cargo cranes lining the stone warehouses. The scene then opens up as the boat steers away from the industrial activity of the port, with the large vessels and cranes receding into the background. Finally, the camera follows the boat toward a sandy beach where the architecture shifts to coastal buildings and the landscape is dominated by palm trees lining the shore.
